ranked_movies.title: Airplane!
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a quintessential comedy classic and a benchmark for the genre. Praised for its clever writing and timeless humor.

ranked_movies.title: The Naked Gun
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently recommended as one of the funniest movies, with the new installment also generating significant discussion. David Zucker's involvement is highlighted.

ranked_movies.title: Shaun of the Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times as a top-tier horror-comedy and a prime example of Edgar Wright's unique style.

ranked_movies.title: What We Do in the Shadows
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a modern classic in the horror-comedy genre and a go-to recommendation for a fun movie night.

ranked_movies.title: Tucker and Dale vs Evil
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended as a hilarious and clever subversion of horror tropes, perfect for a comedy-horror mix.

ranked_movies.title: White Chicks
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed as a cult classic that, despite poor critical reception, has endured and remained popular with audiences.

ranked_movies.title: HIM
ranked_movies.reason: Heavily discussed due to its recent release and polarizing reviews. Marlon Wayans' performance is noted, and the film's premise is considered intriguing.

ranked_movies.title: Extreme Job
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as one of the funniest Korean comedies and a huge box office success in Korea.

ranked_movies.title: Withnail and I
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested as a quintessential and hilarious British cult comedy with memorable quotes.

ranked_movies.title: Sneakers
ranked_movies.reason: Praised in a dedicated thread for being a clever, charming, and well-aged tech thriller with a fantastic cast.

ranked_movies.title: Hera Pheri
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a top favorite Hindi comedy movie and a classic in the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Grandma's Boy
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as an example of a comedy with a low critics score but a high audience score, achieving cult status.

ranked_movies.title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a classic, clean comedy that is genuinely funny and suitable for all audiences.

ranked_movies.title: BASEketball
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a formative and hilariously absurd comedy from David Zucker.

ranked_movies.title: Refugee
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed extensively in the context of Bollywood debuts, with praise for its music and as a brave choice for a first film.

ranked_movies.title: The Frighteners
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a fun horror-comedy with a great performance by Michael J. Fox.

ranked_movies.title: Idle Hands
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested multiple times as a fun and underrated horror-comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Miss Granny
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a sweet and silly Korean comedy that is very popular.

ranked_movies.title: Death at a Funeral
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a hysterical British comedy, specifically the original version.

ranked_movies.title: Braindead
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a hilarious and over-the-top horror-comedy from Peter Jackson.
